_comment: SYNTHETIC DEV EXAMPLE ONLY — do NOT use in production. Token hashes below are PLACEHOLDERS. Generate a real one with: RAW=$(openssl rand -hex 32); printf '%s' "$RAW" | shasum -a 256 | cut -d' ' -f1  — store the RAW token in your secret manager, put only the sha256 hash here (or, preferably, in MCP_CONSUMER_REGISTRY via the deployment env). This file demonstrates a DEV consumer granted a representative subset of Track C2 write scopes (one low, one medium, one high). It is env-restricted to local/staging and is INERT until MCP_WRITE_EXECUTION_AUTHORIZED arms the matching WHMCS action on a non-prod leg (see docs/write-capability-probe-runbook.md). Keep it client-agnostic.
